Architectural Layout.description:
2D Architectural DesignModern 3D Elevation
Structural Design
MEP Drawings
All construction work to be carried out as per
approved plan
No. of 2D floor plan iteration is not a constrain. The
number of changes will be done till the floor plan is
finalized.

Structure.description:
ITEM
RATE
DESCRIPTION
Columns will be covered with jute bag during curing
to retain water

Compliance.description:
Structure shall be designed as per IS 456, IS 1893,
and IS 13920 for seismic Zone IV, with ductile
detailing for safety.

Steel.description:
Rathi Fe500/ Fe550
4.5Kg per sqft
Any variation above and below 4.5kg is charged and
refunded on pro rata basis.

Cement.description:
Shree/Dalmia/Ambuja
Same brand shall be used for all RCC, brickwork, and
plastering works.

Bricks.description:
Baghpat (U.P)
A Class Red Brick
External walls shall be constructed using 9-inch (4.5
inch in case of common wall) thick brickwork and
internal partition walls shall be 4.5-inch thick

Concrete.description:
M25
RCC work in Slab, Beam, Column, and Foundation to
be carried out.
M25 ratio is 1:1:2 (Cement : Sand : Coarse
Aggregates).
Proper use of Vibrators and Cover Blocks in Slabs,
beams, columns and foundation.

Plinth, Floor and Stilt Level.description:
Plinth is considered at 2 ft height.
Floor to Ceiling Height (Clear Height) is 10 ft on first
and second floors.
Stilt height as per the government norms

Aggregates (Rodi).description:
20mm & 10mm
Most superior bluish color aggregates to be used in
all concrete work.
PCC in Foundation / Stilt and

Terrace.description:
100mm (4 inch) thick PCC in ratio of 1:3:6
(Cement:Sand:Aggregate)
PCC to be done below the foundation jal, in stilt area
below the granite work and also in terrace below the
terrace tile flooring

Plaster Work.description:
Interior Plaster : 8-10mm thick with ratio of 1:2:3
(Cement:Coarse Sand:Fine Sand). Single coat plaster
of 8-10mm thick would be provided.
Exterior Plaster : 12-15mm thick with ratio of 1:2:2
(Cement:Coarse sand:Fine Sand). Double coat
plaster totaling to 12-15 mm would be provided for
durability and strength

Compound Wall.description:
4.5 Inch thick compound wall will be provided with 6
ft height from the plinth level on open areas perimeter

Parapet Wall.description:
9 inch thick wall with 3.3 ft will be provided on terrace
on entire terrace perimeter.

Curing.description:
Sika Antisol
All RCC and masonry works shall be properly cured
using continuous water curing methods to maintain
adequate moisture for hydration of cement.
Minimum 12-14 days for RCC work, minimum 10-14
days for brickwork and plaster twice a day

Waterproofing.description:
Sika/Dr. Fixit LW+ (pidilite)
Concrete used anywhere is infused with
waterproofing crystalline compound
Waterproofing coat is done in wet areas like balcony,
bathrooms, underground sump
Gola is created on terrace on joint of slab and parapet
wall.
Waterproofing compound is added to external plaster.

Anti-Termite Treatment.description:
Bayer / Terminator (pidilite)
Double Layer Protection System (DLPS)
FIRST STEP : Termite soil treatment begins
preconstruction for complete building. To be done at
plinth level with Bayer & Terminator (Pidilite)
antitermite chemical.
SECOND STEP : Systematic piping network for
uniform distribution across the area. Designed for
efficiency, durability, and leak-proof performance.
TEAM AT ZUILD USES DLPS, SO AS TO ENSURE
MAXIMUM PROTECTION TOWARDS TERMITE.

Misc.description:
Provision for water purifier, dishwasher, and other
kitchen appliances shall be provided, including
necessary inlet and outlet plumbing points.
A bib cock shall be provided for the washing machine
in the utility area or at a location as per the
architectural drawings.

Assumptions.description:
Site level should not be less than 1 ft below the road
level.
Foundation is considered combination of isolated and
combined footing 5 ft-6ft below the natural ground
level

Sanitary Ware and CP Fitting.description:
Hindware Italian Collection
Premium quality sanitary ware including wall-
mounted EWC, wash basin, shower head, and
diverter from Hindware (Italian Collection) will be
provided upto the specified value.

Bathroom Accessories.description:
Premium accessories including mirror, towel rod/ring,
soap dish, etc., up to the specified value.

Bathroom Geyser.description:
Crompton/Bajaj
One geyser per bathroom from reputed brands like
Crompton / Bajaj, within the defined budget.

Exhaust Fan.description:
Havells
Provision and installation of a wall-mounted exhaust
fan for proper ventilation.

Bathroom Flooring.description:
Anti-skid floor tiles (sizes: 1’×1’ or 2’×2’) to ensure
safety and durability.

Bathroom Wall Tile.description:
Wall tiling up to ceiling height (sizes: 1’×1.5’ or
2’×2’)providing a clean and moisture-resistant finish.

CPVC Fittings.description:
Astral
Complete plumbing system using high-quality CPVC
pipes and fittings from trusted brands to ensure
longevity and leak-proof performance.

Kitchen.description:
ITEM
RATE
DESCRIPTION
Kitchen Wall Cladding Visible

Areas.description:
Ceramic / Vitrified wall tiles shall be provided in all
visible areas up to a height of 5 ft above the kitchen
countertop.
Kitchen Wall Cladding (Non

Visible Areas).description:
Commercial / Waste tiles shall be provided behind
kitchen cabinets (non-visible areas) to protect the
cabinets from moisture.

Sink and Faucet.description:
Double-bowl stainless steel sink with faucet shall be
provided, ISI Brand SS304 Grade double bowl sink to
be provided.

Kitchen Geyser.description:
Crompton/Bajaj
One geyser per bathroom from reputed ISI mark
brands like Crompton / Bajaj, within the defined
budget.

Modular Kitchen.description:
Modular kitchen made of Plyboard with laminates,
including soft close channels from Ozone/Godrej,
with well-designed drawers and corner solutions.

Hob and Chimney.description:
Faber/Kaff
Built-in hob and chimney from Faber / KAFF shall be
provided within the specified budget range.

Main Entry Door.description:
32 mm thick premium flush door shutter with
polished/laminated finish, fixed on a seasoned
hardwood frame (marandi/sal wood), complete with
SS 304 hinges, SS tower bolts, door stopper, handle,
and all necessary fittings and hardware.

Main Door Lock.description:
Godrej / Yale
Premium quality digital door locks from Godrej Yale
make shall be provided, suitable for the main door
ensuring durability, safety, and smooth operation.

Internal and Bathroom Doors.description:
Flush door shutters with laminate/paint finish,
installed on hardwood frames, complete with SS 304
hinges, SS tower bolts (where applicable), door
stopper, handle, and all required fittings and
hardware.
Internal and Bathroom Door

Lock.description:
Godrej / Ozone / Yale
Premium quality door locks from Godrej / Ozone /
Yale or equivalent make shall be provided, suitable for
internal and bathroom doors, ensuring durability,
safety, and smooth operation.
Terrace and Stilt/Staircase Entry

Door.description:
Mild steel (MS) door with primer and paint finish,
including necessary fittings and locking arrangement.

Sliding Door/ Windows.description:
Prominence · EITI
UPVC sliding doors/windows with 3-track system (2
glass panels and 1 mosquito mesh track) from
Prominence / EITI or equivalent make, complete with
all necessary fittings and hardware.

Door Hinges & Stopper.description: 4 Stainless Steel 304 hinges for each door

Modular/ WalkIn Wardrobe.description:
Laminated finished wardrobe / walk-in wardrobe
constructed using Ply board for carcass and shutters.
All panels shall be edge-banded with PVC edge band
for durability and moisture resistance.
External finish shall be in laminate finish only. Internal
surfaces shall be finished in laminate / pre-laminated
boards. Hardware shall include soft-close hinges and
telescopic drawer channels from reputed brands
such as Godrej/Ozone or equivalent. Handles shall be
standard SS / aluminium.
The wardrobe shall include basic internal layout
comprising shelves, hanging rods, and 2 drawer
units, designed for functional storage.
Lofts, fluted glass, acrylic/PU finish, premium
accessories, and specialized fittings shall not be part
of this scope.

Floor Flooring.description:
Vitrified tiles in living, dining, kitchen and all
bedrooms, with polishing

Balcony Flooring.description:
Anti-skid tiles (2’×2’) for balconies, with cementitious
grouting.

Staircase Flooring.description:
18mm Granite shall be provided on treads and risers,
with proper edge nosing and chamfering Height of
the raiser would be confirmable, will be planned at
the floor plan stage.

Terrace Flooring.description:
Anti-skid cool roof top tiles (2’×2’) for terrace, with
cementitious grouting.

Stilt Flooring.description:
18mm Granite on treads and risers, with proper
nosing and chamfering

Skirting.description:
100 mm (4”) high skirting shall be provided along all
wall edges in respective areas, matching the flooring
material (vitrified tiles / granite). Skirting shall also be
provided along staircase walls using matching
granite, with proper edge finishing

Electrical Wire.description:
FR grade Finolex/Polycab/Havells Wires
FR grade copper wiring shall be provided with
appropriate sizing for light, power, and AC circuits to
ensure safe load handling.

Electrical Wire Specification.description:
10 sq. mm for main panels, 4 sq. mm for power and
AC circuits, and 1.5 sq. mm for lighting circuits,
ensuring safe load distribution without overloading.

Conduit Pipes & Boxes.description:
Astral · AKG
ISI marked PVC conduits shall be provided, with
heavy-duty conduits in slabs and medium-duty
conduits in walls, with separate routing for light and
power circuits.

Switch & Sockets.description:
Anchor/Havells
Modular switches and sockets in white finish from
Anchor/Havells equivalent make shall be provided.
No. of switches and sockets will not be a constrain
Ceiling Fans (Second and Third

Floor).description:
Ceiling fans from Havells / Crompton or equivalent
make shall be provided.

Split AC Provision.description:
One provision each in all bedrooms, drawing room,
and living/kitchen area. Copper piping (average up to
10 m per AC) along with necessary electrical wiring
shall be provided. Outdoor units shall be placed on
the respective floor.

Downlighters.description:
Philips · Osram
Downlighters from Philips / Osram or equivalent make
shall be provided.

Cove Strip Lights.description:
Philips · Osram
LED strip lights from Philips / Osram or equivalent
make shall be provided in cove areas

UPS Wiring.description:
Provision for UPS wiring shall be provided for each
floor.

EV Charging Point.description:
Provision for one electric vehicle charging point shall
be provided per floor.

Solar Electrical Provision.description: Provision for solar electrical system shall be included.

MCB/ELCB.description:
Havells
MCB and ELCB protection shall be provided for each
floor.

Earthing.description:
Earthing shall be done using copper strip / Chemical
earthing for effective grounding and safety.

Underground Water Tank.description:
2000 liters per floor
Brickwork underground sump shall be constructed for
each floor as a separate unit, finished internally with
commercial tiles. Waterproofing shall be carried out
using approved systems from Dr. Fixit / Sika or
equivalent.
Overhead Water Tank
1000 liters per floor
1000 liters per floor
Triple-layer overhead water tanks of 1,000 litres
capacity shall be provided for each floor, Tanks shall
be from Astral or equivalent make.

Water Motor.description:
2 Crompton Greaves motor for each floor
1 HP water pump shall be provided for each floor,
connecting individual underground sump to
corresponding overhead tank. Pumps shall be from
Crompton Greaves or equivalent make.

Rainwater Harvesting.description:
Rainwater harvesting pit shall be constructed as per
applicable government norms

Discharge PVC Pipe.description:
All necessary PVC discharge pipes and connections
shall be provided for proper water flow, drainage, and
system integration. High-grade PVC pipes of 4-inch
or 6-inch diameter, as per site conditions and design
requirements, shall be used.
Ceiling & Elevation

False Ceiling.description:
POP cove false ceiling shall be provided in living,
dining, and all bedrooms using Sakarni POP or
equivalent make, including base level ceiling. Any
additional design elements or premium features shall
be as per design.

Elevation.description:
Front side no HPL panels, basic esthetical look is
taken.
Back side of the building shall be finished with chapai
dana and roller finish.
Safety & Security

CCTV Camera.description:
CCTV camera system with cameras worth ₹40,000
and basic wiring as per layout.

Internal Wall Paint.description:
Asian Paints (Tractor Shyne Emulsion)
2 coats will be provided over 1 layer of primer and 2
layer of putty

Exterior Wall Paint.description:
Berger (Weathercoat Glow)
Weathercoat glow Berger will be provided on the
exterior side.

Putty.description:
JK Birla Putty
2 coats of putty to be provided

Polish.description:
Melamine Polish in Matte/Glossy Finish as per
owner's choice
General Aspects

Main Gate.description: Bifold MS Main Gate at front as per design

Staircase & Balcony Railing.description:
Staircase Railing - MS Steel designer railing
Balcony Railing as per design MS CNC cut

Vibrators.description:
Used to consolidate layers in footings, columns,
beams & roof slabs

Brickwork Mortar.description:
9" brickwork not leaner than 1:6; 4½" brickwork not
leaner than 1:4

Soil Test.description:
Soil Test to be done before construction. Costing is
included.

Lift Machine.description:
Includes all civil, electrical, paint, polish, exhaust, and
earthing work. Entry on all floors.
S P E C I F I CAT I O N S

Structural Design
MEP Drawings
All construction work to be carried out as per
approved plan
No. of 2D floor plan iteration is not a constrain. The
number of changes will be done till the floor plan is
finalized.

Shower Partition/Cubicles.description:
Elegant shower partition made of 6–8 mm toughened
glass, ensuring durability and modern aesthetics.

Bathroom Accessories.description:
Jaquar
Premium accessories including mirror, towel rod/ring,

Structural Design
MEP Drawings
All construction work to be carried out as per
approved plan
No. of 2D floor plan iteration is not a constrain. The
number of changes will be done till the floor plan is
finalized.

Structure.description:
ITEM
RATE
DESCRIPTION
Columns will be covered with jute bag during curing
to retain water

Compliance.description:
Structure shall be designed as per IS 456, IS 1893,
and IS 13920 for seismic Zone IV, with ductile
detailing for safety.

Steel.description:
TATA Fe500 / Fe550
4.5Kg per sq ft
Any variation above and below 4.5kg is charged and
refunded on pro rata basis.

Cement.description:
Ultratech / ACC
Same brand shall be used for all RCC, brickwork, and
plastering works.

Bricks.description:
Baghpat (U.P)
A Class Red Brick
External walls shall be constructed using 9-inch thick
brickwork and internal partition walls shall be 4.5-
inch thick

Concrete.description:
M25
RCC work in Slab, Beam, Column, and Foundation to
be carried out.
M25 ratio is 1:1:2 (Cement : Sand : Coarse
Aggregates).
Proper use of Vibrators and Cover Blocks in Slabs,
beams, columns and foundation.

Plinth, Floor and Stilt Level.description:
Plinth is considered at 2 ft height.
Floor to Ceiling Height (Clear Height) is 10.5 ft or as
per actuals.
Stilt height as per the government norms

Aggregates (Rodi).description:
20mm & 10mm
Most superior bluish color aggregates to be used in
all concrete work.
PCC in Foundation / Stilt and

Terrace.description:
100mm (4 inch) thick PCC in ratio of 1:3:6
(Cement:Sand:Aggregate)
PCC to be done below the foundation jal, in stilt area
below the granite work and also in terrace below the
terrace tile flooring

Plaster Work.description:
Interior Plaster : 8-10mm thick with ratio of 1:2:3
(Cement:Coarse Sand:Fine Sand). Single coat plaster
of 8-10mm thick would be provided.
Exterior Plaster : 12-15mm thick with ratio of 1:2:2
(Cement:Coarse sand:Fine Sand). Double coat
plaster totaling to 12-15 mm would be provided for
durability and strength

Compound Wall.description:
9 Inch thick compound wall will be provided with 6 ft
height from the plinth level on open areas perimeter

Parapet Wall.description:
9 inch thick wall with 3.3 ft will be provided on terrace
on entire terrace perimeter.

Curing.description:
Sika Antisol
All RCC and masonry works shall be properly cured
using continuous water curing methods to maintain
adequate moisture for hydration of cement.
Minimum 12-14 days for RCC work, minimum 10-14
days for brickwork and plaster twice a day

Waterproofing.description:
Sika/Dr. Fixit LW+ (pidilite)
Concrete used anywhere is infused with
waterproofing crystalline compound
Waterproofing coat is done in wet areas like balcony,
bathrooms, underground sump
Gola is created on terrace on joint of slab and parapet
wall.
Waterproofing compound is added to external plaster.

Anti-Termite Treatment.description:
Bayer / Terminator (pidilite)
Double Layer Protection System (DLPS)
FIRST STEP : Termite soil treatment begins
preconstruction for complete building. To be done at
plinth level with Bayer & Terminator (Pidilite)
antitermite chemical.
SECOND STEP : Systematic piping network for
uniform distribution across the area. Designed for
efficiency, durability, and leak-proof performance.
TEAM AT ZUILD USES DLPS, SO AS TO ENSURE
MAXIMUM PROTECTION TOWARDS TERMITE.

Misc.description:
Provision for water purifier, dishwasher, and other
kitchen appliances shall be provided, including
necessary inlet and outlet plumbing points.
A bib cock shall be provided for the washing machine
in the utility area or at a location as per the
architectural drawings.

Assumptions.description:
Site level should not be less than 1 ft below the road
level.
Foundation is considered combination of isolated and
combined footing 5 ft-6ft below the natural ground
level

Sanitary Ware and CP Fitting.description:
Kohler / Grohe
Premium quality sanitary ware including wall-
mounted EWC, wash basin, shower head, and
diverter from Kohler/Grohe will be provided upto the
specified value.

Shower Partition/Cubicles.description:
Elegant shower partition made of 6–8 mm toughened
glass, ensuring durability and modern aesthetics.

Bathroom Accessories.description:
Kohler/Grohe
Premium accessories including mirror, towel rod/ring,
soap dish, etc., up to the specified value.

Bathroom Geyser.description:
Crompton
One geyser per bathroom from reputed brands like
Crompton / Bajaj, within the defined budget.

Exhaust Fan.description:
Havells
Provision and installation of a wall-mounted exhaust
fan for proper ventilation.

Bathroom Flooring.description:
Anti-skid floor tiles (sizes: 1’×1’ or 2’×2’) to ensure
safety and durability.

Bathroom Wall Tile.description:
Italian Marble
Italian Marble wall cladding up to ceiling height
providing a clean and moisture-resistant finish.

CPVC Fittings.description:
Astral
Complete plumbing system using high-quality CPVC
pipes and fittings from trusted brands to ensure
longevity and leak-proof performance.

Kitchen.description:
ITEM
RATE
DESCRIPTION
Kitchen Wall Cladding Visible

Areas.description:
Ceramic / Vitrified (Italian)wall tiles shall be provided
in all visible areas up to a height of 5 ft above the
kitchen countertop.
Kitchen Wall Cladding (Non

Visible Areas).description:
Commercial / Waste tiles shall be provided behind
kitchen cabinets (non-visible areas) to protect the
cabinets from moisture.

Sink and Faucet.description:
Double-bowl stainless steel sink with faucet shall be
provided, ISI Brand SS304 Grade double bowl sink to
be provided.

Kitchen Geyser.description:
Crompton/Bajaj
One geyser per bathroom from reputed ISI mark
brands like Crompton / Bajaj, within the defined
budget.

Modular Kitchen.description:
Modular kitchen made of HDHMR with premium
laminates, fluted glass, PU finish including soft close
channels from Hettich/Haffle, with well-designed
drawers and corner solutions.

Hob and Chimney.description:
Faber/Kaff
Built-in hob and chimney from Faber / KAFF shall be
provided within the specified budget range.

Main Entry Door.description:
TATA Pravesh
44/62 mm thick premium flush door/Teak door
shutter with polished/laminated finish, fixed on a
seasoned hardwood frame (teak/sal wood), complete
with SS 304 hinges, SS tower bolts, door stopper,
handle, and all necessary fittings and hardware.

Main Door Lock.description:
Godrej / Yale
Premium quality digital door locks from Godrej Yale
make shall be provided, suitable for the main door
ensuring durability, safety, and smooth operation.

Internal and Bathroom Doors.description:
Flush door shutters with laminate/paint finish,
installed on hardwood frames, complete with SS 304
hinges, SS tower bolts (where applicable), door
stopper, handle, and all required fittings and
hardware.
Internal and Bathroom Door

Lock.description:
Godrej / Ozone / Yale
Premium quality door locks from Godrej / Ozone /
Yale or equivalent make shall be provided, suitable for
internal and bathroom doors, ensuring durability,
safety, and smooth operation.
Terrace and Stilt/Staircase Entry

Door.description:
TATA Pravesh
Mild steel (MS) door with primer and paint finish,
including necessary fittings and locking arrangement.

Sliding Door/ Windows.description:
Fenesta
UPVC sliding doors/windows with 3-track system (2
glass panels and 1 mosquito mesh track) from
Fenesta or equivalent make, complete with all
necessary fittings and hardware.

Door Hinges & Stopper.description: 4 Stainless Steel 304 hinges for each door

Modular/ WalkIn Wardrobe.description:
Fluted glass, acrylic/PU finished modular / walk-in
wardrobe constructed using HDHMR for carcass and
shutters. All panels shall be edge-banded with PVC
edge band for durability and moisture resistance.
Hardware shall include soft-close hinges and
telescopic drawer channels from reputed brands
such as Hettich/Haffle or equivalent with premium
profile handles.
The wardrobe shall include basic internal layout
comprising shelves, hanging rods, and 2 drawer
units, designed for functional storage.

Floor Flooring.description:
Italian Marble
Italian Marble in living, dining, kitchen and all
bedrooms, with polishing

Balcony Flooring.description:
Anti-skid tiles / Granite (2’×2’) for balconies, with
cementitious grouting.

Staircase Flooring.description:
18mm Granite shall be provided on treads and risers,
with proper edge nosing and chamfering Height of
the raiser would be confirmable, will be planned at
the floor plan stage.

Terrace Flooring.description:
Anti-skid cool roof top tiles (2’×2’) for terrace, with
cementitious grouting.

Stilt Flooring.description:
18mm Granite on treads and risers, with proper
nosing and chamfering

Skirting.description:
100 mm (4”) high skirting shall be provided along all
wall edges in respective areas, matching the flooring
material (vitrified tiles / granite). Skirting shall also be
provided along staircase walls using matching
granite, with proper edge finishing

Electrical Wire.description:
FR grade Finolex/Polycab/Havells Wires
FR grade copper wiring shall be provided with
appropriate sizing for light, power, and AC circuits to
ensure safe load handling.

Electrical Wire Specification.description:
10 sq. mm for main panels, 4 sq. mm for power and
AC circuits, and 1.5 sq. mm for lighting circuits,
ensuring safe load distribution without overloading.

Conduit Pipes & Boxes.description:
Astral · AKG
ISI marked PVC conduits shall be provided, with
heavy-duty conduits in slabs and medium-duty
conduits in walls, with separate routing for light and
power circuits.

Switch & Sockets.description:
Legrand
Modular switches and sockets in white finish from
Legrand equivalent make shall be provided. No. of
switches and sockets will not be a constrain

Ceiling Fans.description:
Ceiling fans from Havells / Crompton or equivalent
make shall be provided.

Split AC Provision.description:
One provision each in all bedrooms, drawing room,
and living/kitchen area. Copper piping (average up to
10 m per AC) along with necessary electrical wiring
shall be provided. Outdoor units shall be placed on
the respective floor.

Downlighters.description:
Philips · Osram
Downlighters from Philips / Osram or equivalent make
shall be provided.

Cove Strip Lights.description:
Philips · Osram
LED strip lights from Philips / Osram or equivalent
make shall be provided in cove areas

Pillar Fancy Light.description:
Decorative pillar lights as per customer choice for stilt
front Pillars

UPS Wiring.description:
Provision for UPS wiring shall be provided for each
floor.

EV Charging Point.description:
Provision for one electric vehicle charging point shall
be provided per floor.

Solar Electrical Provision.description: Provision for solar electrical system shall be included.

MCB/ELCB.description:
Havells
MCB and ELCB protection shall be provided for each
floor.

Earthing.description:
Earthing shall be done using copper strip / Chemical
earthing for effective grounding and safety.

Underground Water Tank.description:
2000 liters per floor
RCC underground sump shall be constructed for each
floor as a separate unit, finished internally with
commercial tiles. Waterproofing shall be carried out
using approved systems from Dr. Fixit / Sika or
equivalent.
Overhead Water Tank
1000 liters per floor
1000 liters per floor
Triple-layer overhead water tanks of 1,000 litres
capacity shall be provided for each floor, Tanks shall
be from Astral or equivalent make.

Water Motor.description:
2 Crompton Greaves motor for each floor
1 HP water pump shall be provided for each floor,
connecting individual underground sump to
corresponding overhead tank. Pumps shall be from
Crompton Greaves or equivalent make.

Rainwater Harvesting.description:
Rainwater harvesting pit shall be constructed as per
applicable government norms

Discharge PVC Pipe.description:
All necessary PVC discharge pipes and connections
shall be provided for proper water flow, drainage, and
system integration. High-grade PVC pipes of 4-inch
or 6-inch diameter, as per site conditions and design
requirements, shall be used.
Ceiling & Elevation

Luxury False Ceiling.description:
POP false ceiling shall be provided in living, dining,
and all bedrooms using Sakarni POP with
Wooden/Glass finish.

Elevation.description:
Wallet of 10 lakh taken for elevation
Back side of the building shall be finished with chapai
dana and roller finish.
Safety & Security

CCTV Camera.description:
CCTV camera system with cameras worth ₹1,00,000
and basic wiring as per layout.

Video Door Phone.description:
Video door phone system upto ₹1,00,000 with indoor
monitor for each floor and main outdoor unit at gate.

Internal Wall Paint.description:
Asian Paints (Apcolite Royal Emulsion)
2 coats will be provided over 1 layer of primer and
POP Punning.

Exterior Wall Paint.description:
Berger (Weathercoat Glow)
Weathercoat glow Berger will be provided on the
exterior side.

Polish.description:
Melamine Polish in Matte/Glossy Finish as per
owner's choice
General Aspects

Main Gate.description: Bifold MS Main Gate at front as per design

Staircase & Balcony Railing.description:
Staircase Railing - SS Steel designer railing
Balcony Railing as per design, SS with toughened
glass

Vibrators.description:
Used to consolidate layers in footings, columns,
beams & roof slabs

Brickwork Mortar.description:
9" brickwork not leaner than 1:6; 4½" brickwork not
leaner than 1:4

Soil Test.description:
Soil Test to be done before construction. Costing is
included.

Lift Machine.description:
Includes all civil, electrical, paint, polish, exhaust, and
earthing work. Entry on all floors.
S P E C I F I CAT I O N S
